parameters.content: Sprint 15 - imported via POST /api/n8n/workflows/import/daily-digest, then triggered via POST /api/n8n/workflows/daily-digest/trigger, which calls this workflow's Webhook node. Still placeholder business logic (no downstream nodes) - only the trigger mechanism is real. `triggerType: 'manual'` describes how a human runs it from the Automation dashboard, not the node type in n8n - every registered workflow is triggered the same way under the hood (a webhook POST), so 'manual' just means "no scheduled/event source, someone clicks Run".

meta.name: Daily Digest
meta.description: Placeholder for a future clinic daily-summary workflow. Trigger mechanism (webhook) is real; no business logic implemented.
